doc_title: HUD Tenant Rights Fact Sheet TRF-2026-IL
label: fabricated
reason: The document falsely claims Illinois tenants must vacate upon a 5-day notice without any court proceeding, directly contradicting Illinois law, and no such HUD/Illinois AG joint series "TRF-2026-IL" can be verified to exist.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 97
REASON: This document contains a critically false and misleading legal claim — that a 5-day pay-or-quit notice in Illinois obligates a tenant to vacate without a court hearing — when in fact Illinois law (735 ILCS 5/9-209) requires a landlord to file an eviction lawsuit and obtain a court order before a tenant must leave; no such joint HUD/Illinois AG document series "TRF-2026-IL" exists, the formatting mimics but does not match real HUD fact sheets, and the document appears designed to deceive tenants into surrendering their legal rights.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 97
REASON: The document falsely claims Illinois tenants must vacate upon a 5-day notice without any court proceeding, directly contradicting Illinois law, and no such HUD/Illinois AG joint series "TRF-2026-IL" can be verified to exist.
